sections.title: Before speaking to the Easter Bunny
Talking to Doughphie after reading the recipe
Talking to Doughphie after getting the dough

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: You again! What is it now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the dough.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: I need to get back to work now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll talk to you later. Bye!

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Quick quick, only a moment to spare, what's up?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need more of that yeastier dough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Though thinking about it, I don't have enough space at the moment. I'll come back.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Yes yes, come back. Very good.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Alright, alright, here you go. Please keep in mind I'm not made of dough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You look like you are, all covered in flour.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Occupational hazard! You get used to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I need some yeastier dough, do you have any?

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Yeastier dough? I don't know.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think it's just particularly yeasty dough.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: And why would I give you any of my lovely dough?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm making some Easter Buns to cheer up the Easter Bunny.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Oh that silly Eggrabbit! Anything for him.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Of course you'll need space to carry the dough, come back when you can handle it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Here you go, yeastier dough.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: It's potent stuff!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, that's very kind of you.

sections.title: Doughphie after giving the bun to Easter Bunny

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: I hope you put that dough to good use.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh I did indeed.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Can't talk now, pies to make! Bread to bake! Breaks to take!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem a bit stressed.

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: Far from it, just busy busy busy! Best way to be!

lines.speaker: Cooky Weasel
lines.text: Oi!

lines.speaker: Doughphie
lines.text: I've got to go!
